items.title: Robertson relishing chance to lead Scotland at World Cup
items.summary: Andy Robertson was expected to be named in Scotland's World Cup squad, but he admitted it was a "huge pinch yourself moment"when he was confirmed as one of Steve Clarke's 26-man party.

items.title: World Cup warm-up match suspended as former Man Utd transfer target takes out referee with brutal shoulder barge
items.summary: FRANCE'S World Cup warm-up clash against Ivory Coast was halted after Franck Kessie brutally shoulder-barged the referee. items.title: Chelsea ‘to hijack Brighton and Newcastle’s move for 18-year-old wonderkid in shock £20million transfer swoop’
items.summary: CHELSEA are reportedly threatening to gazump Brighton and Newcastle in the race to land Zadok Yohanna. items.title: The familiar phone call after Morrison's NI debut
items.summary: Liverpool teenager Kieran Morrison said he was "buzzing" to make his senior Northern Ireland debut against Guinea on Thursday.

items.title: Former Brazil World Cup star and uncle of Premier League icon dies at 76 after long battle with Alzheimer’s
items.summary: FORMER Brazil International Leivinha has died aged 76 after a long battle against Alzheimer’s. The ex-Palmeiras and Atletico Madrid winger, uncle of former Liverpool star Lucas Leiva, was capped 27 times by his country and played in three matches at the 1974 World Cup in Germany. items.title: Farrell extends Ireland deal to 2031 World Cup
items.summary: Andy Farrell has signed a contract extension with the Irish Rugby Football Union (IRFU) to remain Ireland head coach until the end of the 2031 Rugby World Cup.

items.title: Will club momentum boost NI's World Cup hopes?
items.summary: With silverware fresh in their hands, many of Northern Ireland's players will arrive for international duty brimming with confidence.

items.title: F1 to race in Las Vegas until 2037
items.summary: Las Vegas will continue to host a Formula 1 Grand Prix until at ‌least 2037 after agreeing a 10-year contract extension.

items.title: World Cup quiz: Name every player in England's squad
items.summary: There are just 12 days until England play their World Cup opener against Croatia - but can you name ever member of the squad picked by Thomas Tuchel?

items.title: Football regulator will reject call to play bigger role in promoting equality at clubs
items.summary: Kick It Out wants equality, diversity and inclusion targets Regulator decides against after licensing consultation The Independent Football Regulator (IFR) is poised to reject calls from Kick It Out to take on a greater role in promoting equality, diversity and inclusion (EDI) throughout the sport.
